title: NotchCraft
description: Craft Golden Apples and Enchanted Golden Apples in your Vanilla Minecraft Server (NO MODS REQUIRED!)
body: Craft Golden Apples and Enchanted Golden Apples in your Vanilla Minecraft Server (NO MODS REQUIRED!) Also Renames the Enchanted Golden Apples to their Correct Name Respected Throughout Our Community for Years..... the Notch Apple!!
